title: Super Sword
description: An update from a resource pack I made years ago, it works in normal minecraft without mods and works with optifine and other mods
body:
![like this](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd552b42a17158f864ca884f8ded0902b0fe5bc3.png)Credits to nonamecrackers2 for doing the textures I used in this separated sword pack

 

It got a little improved when i logged again on curseforge

Adds Command tools to the game just like as MCSM and Crackers Wither Storm in a resource pack format, it has animated textures to the tools

**What are the features?**

Adds the texture of the tools, thats all and its a resource pack, it wont add I dont know, dragons or something like that

**Does this is compatible at all?**

If i know maybe can work on everything if it supports the versions i put on the file, Mojang can change the texture format so maybe it can be unsupported in any time
